prompt:
First-person (head-mounted) camera footage of a worker in an electronics factory, looking down at their own hands. The worker wears a blue smock. (time t=0.0s). Report only what you can see (no guessing).

- reach_shelf: Is an arm extended toward a wall shelf full of parts? (answer with yes or no)

- tray_visible: Is a black grid tray with many small compartments visible in the frame? (answer with yes or no)
